caption: A man with a beard and a smile is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, featuring framed photos on the wall and apparel on racks in the background. He is wearing a dark green t-shirt with white text that reads "I NEVER D[O] SHIT AT ALL," a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the beginning, he is smiling and looking toward someone off-camera. He then turns his head to the side and begins drinking from a red plastic cup. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands behind him. Small logos featuring a red and white design with the text "RED VELVET TOT" and a circular logo that reads "BREEZY" appear as overlays in the corners of the scene.
